opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My mouth is like sandpaper, I couldn't swallow my dinner, and now my throat is burning. I feel like something is stuck.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It happened while eating dry crackers and I'm scared food is stuck or my throat is closing.

symptom_narrative.character: severe dry mouth, food adhering, burning oropharyngeal pain, gagging, feeling of something stuck
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: can swallow water; no drooling; no fever; no facial/parotid swelling; voice normal
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: longstanding dry eyes and dry mouth (sicca)

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: dry eyes and dry mouth (sicca) (dry eyes/mouth, SSA/Ro positive)

objective_data_offered.value: I can sip and swallow water without choking, my voice is normal, and I'm not drooling; my face/jaw aren't swollen
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-report over video; reassuring for airway/bolus but not a formal ENT examination
